pr.title: 10L XSA + EMA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + TTT — val_bpb 1.1365

output.summary: Combines a 10-layer GPT with XSA on top layers, EMA, partial RoPE, LN scaling, and post-quant TTT SGD on validation data.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Performs TTT-style SGD finetuning on held-out validation shard after quantization.
techniques: Exclusive Self-Attention on top layers with partial RoPE and LN scaling
Int5 MLP/Int6 attention quant plus pruning with FP16 passthrough
Post-quant TTT SGD on validation data
